title: Can Hungarian Holocaust Survivors Find Justice in the U.S.?
summary_full: For more than a decade, a group of survivors have fought a legal battle to get American courts to hear their suit against Hungary’s national railroad over its role in the atrocities.
summary_public: For more than a decade, a group of survivors have fought a legal battle to get American courts to hear their suit against Hungary’s national railroad over its role in the atrocities.

HU.label: negative
HU.evidence: Hungary’s national railroad over its role in the atrocities.
